title: Effective Python
subtitle: 90 Specific Ways to Write Better Python
author: Brett Slatkin
themes: Use standard library before rolling your own
Write code that is readable and maintainable
awards: One of the highest-rated Python books on Amazon
Used as reference at Google and other tech companies
excerpt: The goal of this book is to help you become a more effective Python programmer. It covers the 'Pythonic' way to solve problems — the approach that experienced Python programmers use every day.
